message:
feat(tui): reorder dashboard KPI tiles by operational priority

Puts Messages and Ack Pending first (actionable flow metrics) and moves
Uptime last (infrastructure context).  Compact density now shows Msg,
Agents, Req instead of Up, Req, Msg.  Normal density gains Ack Pending.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
